narrative:
Wauseon Two (precinct in Fulton County) has 952 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.9 percentage points.
